_publications._publicationTitle: Validity and interexaminer reliability of a new method to quantify skin neurofibromas of neurofibromatosis 1 using paper frames.

_contextSnippet: when a threshold of 10 neurofibromas was seen, an agreement higher than 90% could be achieved. When the threshold of 20 neurofibromas was achieved, the agreement between A and B examiners was equal, being around 96%
details: Agreement >90% achieved at threshold of 10 neurofibromas, ~96% at 20 neurofibromas, and ~100% at 36-40 neurofibromas
